title: Yosys unable to parse weird parameter definitions

features.name: uninitialized parameter declaration
features.description: Code should include a parameter declaration without an initializer value (just name and type, no '=' or default)

features.name: replication operator with expression
features.description: Code should include a replication operator where the replication count is a complex expression (like a parameter reference in an exponentiation)

features.name: specify block with empty path delay
features.description: Code should include a specify block with a path delay statement using an empty string
